chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 281 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.2212/2024 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of bail application 13.05.2024 Mr. Mir Ali Nawaz Khan, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant, who initially was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by the trial court, due to certain circumstances had absconded. He intends to surrender before the trial court, as complainant, who is present in Court, has no objection to bail of applicant. Hence he does not press this bail application and would file the same in the trial court with affidavit of the complainant, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application, in above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
